info.title: KeyGo Server API
info.description:
Enterprise authentication service — open source alternative for centralized identity, user and access management.

🔒 Protected endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>`.

tags.name: OIDC Discovery
tags.description: Public OIDC discovery and JWKS endpoints — no authentication required. Returns raw JSON (not BaseResponse) for compatibility with third-party OAuth2/OIDC libraries.

tags.name: Billing — Subscription
tags.description: Subscription & invoice management — requires Bearer JWT with ADMIN_TENANT role

tags.name: Registration
tags.description: Public user self-registration and email verification endpoints

tags.name: Platform
tags.description: Public platform endpoints — no authentication required

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Administrative endpoints — requires ADMIN Bearer JWT

tags.name: Memberships
tags.description: User access to applications — requires Bearer JWT

tags.name: Billing — Contracts
tags.description: Self-service contracting flow — no auth required (email & payment verification built into the flow)

tags.name: Client Apps
tags.description: OAuth2 client application management per tenant — requires Bearer JWT

tags.name: Billing — Catalog
tags.description: App plan catalog — public read, admin write

tags.name: OAuth2 / Authorization
tags.description: OAuth2 Authorization Code + PKCE flow, token exchange, refresh token rotation and client_credentials grant — all public endpoints (no X-KEYGO-ADMIN)

tags.name: Tenants
tags.description: Tenant lifecycle management — requires Bearer JWT

tags.name: Account Settings
tags.description: Self-service account security and settings — requires Bearer token (no X-KEYGO-ADMIN)

tags.name: Account Profile
tags.description: Self-service profile management — requires Bearer token (no X-KEYGO-ADMIN)

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User identity management per tenant — requires Bearer JWT

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific user by its UUID within the tenant.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: User or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

put.description: Updates the firstName and lastName of an existing user.

404.description: User or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

put.description: Suspends an active user account within the tenant. Requires user to be in ACTIVE status.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: User or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

put.description: Reactivates a previously suspended user account within the tenant.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: User or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Client app or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

put.description: Updates name, description, redirect URIs, grants or scopes of an existing client app.

400.description: Request body validation failed (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Client app or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

put.description: Suspends an active tenant. A suspended tenant cannot be used for authentication.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Unique slug identifier of the tenant

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

put.description: Reactivates a suspended or pending tenant, allowing it to process authentication requests again.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Unique slug identifier of the tenant

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all tenants. Supports optional filtering by status and partial name match, plus sorting. Requires ADMIN role.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by tenant status (ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, PENDING)

400.description: Invalid pagination parameters (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

post.description: Creates a new tenant with the given name and owner email. A URL-friendly slug is automatically generated from the name.

400.description: Request body validation failed (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

409.description: A tenant with the derived slug already exists (code: DUPLICATE_TENANT)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of user accounts under the specified tenant. Supports filtering by status and partial email/username match, plus sorting.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by user status (ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, PENDING, RESET_PASSWORD)

400.description: Invalid pagination parameters (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Creates a new user account scoped to the specified tenant. Username and email must be unique within the tenant.

400.description: Request body validation failed (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

409.description: Email or username already exists in this tenant (code: DUPLICATE_RESOURCE)

post.description: Administratively resets the password of a user within the tenant.

400.description: Request body validation failed (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: User or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Validates a user's credentials (email or username + password) within the tenant. Returns user data on success.

400.description: Request body validation failed (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Invalid credentials or Bearer token missing (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: User or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description:
Multi-grant token endpoint. The `grant_type` field selects the behaviour:

| `grant_type` | Required fields | Returns |
|---|---|---|
| `authorization_code` | `client_id`, `code`, `redirect_uri`, `code_verifier` | `access_token` + `id_token` + `refresh_token` |
| `refresh_token` | `client_id`, `refresh_token` | new `access_token` + `id_token` + rotated `refresh_token` |
| `client_credentials` | `client_id`, `client_secret`, `scope` | `access_token` only (M2M) |

200.description: Token(s) issued successfully (code: TOKEN_ISSUED / REFRESH_TOKEN_ROTATED / CLIENT_CREDENTIALS_TOKEN_ISSUED)

400.description: Invalid request — missing required fields for the selected grant_type (code: INVALID_INPUT)

401.description: Invalid code, credentials or token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant or client app not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Revokes a refresh token per RFC 7009. The endpoint is **idempotent** — if the token does not exist or has already been revoked, 200 OK is returned anyway to prevent token existence enumeration. No authentication header required.

200.description: Token revoked — or silently ignored if unknown (code: TOKEN_REVOKED)

400.description: Request body validation failed (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

get.description: List memberships with optional pagination, filtering by user or app, and sorting

400.description: Invalid pagination parameters (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

post.description: Grant user access to an application with specified roles

400.description: Request body validation failed (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

403.description: Tenant suspended or membership inactive (code: BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION)

404.description: Tenant or client app not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

409.description: Membership already exists for this user + app (code: DUPLICATE_RESOURCE)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of OAuth2 client applications under the specified tenant. Supports filtering by status and partial name match, plus sorting.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by application status (ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, PENDING)

400.description: Invalid pagination parameters (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Registers a new OAuth2 client application under the specified tenant. Returns the `clientId` and a one-time visible `clientSecret` — store it securely.

400.description: Request body validation failed (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Validates the 6-digit code received by email. If valid, the user is activated (status → ACTIVE). If expired, a new code must be requested.

200.description: Email verified — user is now active (code: EMAIL_VERIFIED)

400.description: Invalid or already-used verification code (code: INVALID_INPUT)

404.description: User or client app not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

422.description: Verification code has expired — request a new one (code: EMAIL_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED)

post.description: Generates a new `clientSecret` for a confidential client app, invalidating the previous one. The new secret is returned once — store it securely.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Client app or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Generates and sends a new verification code. Only allowed once the previous code has expired (30-minute window).

404.description: User not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

409.description: Current code is still active — wait until it expires (code: BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION)

post.description: Creates a new user with PENDING status and sends a 6-digit verification code to the provided email. The code is valid for 30 minutes.

201.description: User registered — verification email sent (code: USER_REGISTERED)

400.description: Request body validation failed (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

404.description: Tenant or client app not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

409.description: Email or username already exists in this tenant (code: DUPLICATE_RESOURCE)

post.description: Marks the active subscription for cancellation at the end of the current billing period. Requires ADMIN_TENANT role.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: No subscription found for this contractor (code: SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND)

422.description: Subscription is not active and cannot be cancelled (code: SUBSCRIPTION_INVALID_STATE)

post.description: Creates a new plan with its initial version (price, currency, billing period, trial days) and an optional list of entitlements (feature flags and usage quotas). The plan code must be unique within the client app. Requires Bearer JWT with ADMIN_TENANT role.

400.description: Request body validation failed (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant or client app not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

409.description: A plan with the same code already exists for this client app (code: DUPLICATE_RESOURCE)

get.description: List roles defined for a client application with optional pagination, filtering, and sorting

400.description: Invalid pagination parameters (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant or client app not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Create a new role within a client application

400.description: Request body validation failed (code: INVALID_INPUT). data.field_errors lists each invalid field.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

403.description: Tenant suspended or insufficient permissions (code: BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION / INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS)

404.description: Tenant or client app not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

409.description: Role code already exists in this app (code: DUPLICATE_RESOURCE)

post.description: Set a parent role for the given child role. Replaces any existing parent. Enforces cycle-free assignment and max depth of 5 levels.

400.description: Cycle detected or depth exceeded (code: INVALID_INPUT)

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant, app or role not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

delete.description: Remove the parent assignment from the given role. No-op if it has no parent.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant, app or role not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Allows a user in RESET_PASSWORD status to set their permanent password using the temporary password assigned by the administrator. Requires the `request_id` (UUID returned in the 401 login response), the 6-digit verification code received by email, the temporary password, and the new password (with confirmation). No Bearer token required.

400.description: New password violates policy, passwords don't match, invalid code format or invalid request_id format (code: INVALID_INPUT)

403.description: Temporary password incorrect or user not in RESET_PASSWORD status (code: BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION)

404.description: Reset request not found or user not found in tenant (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Sets a new password using the one-time recovery token received by email. The token is invalidated after use. No authentication required.

400.description: New password violates policy (code: INVALID_INPUT)

404.description: Recovery token not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

422.description: Token expired or already used (code: BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION)

post.summary: Submit credentials and issue authorization code
post.description:
Authenticates the user within the tenant and issues a one-time authorization code. Requires an active authorization session established by `GET /oauth2/authorize`.

The returned `code` must be exchanged for tokens via `POST /oauth2/token` (`grant_type=authorization_code`) using the original PKCE `code_verifier`.

If the user account has `status=RESET_PASSWORD`, the login is blocked (401) and a 6-digit verification code is sent to their email. The frontend should redirect to the reset-password form.

200.description: Login successful — authorization code issued (code: LOGIN_SUCCESSFUL)

400.description: No authorization state in session — call GET /oauth2/authorize first (code: INVALID_INPUT)

401.description: Invalid credentials or password reset required (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED | RESET_PASSWORD_REQUIRED)

404.description: User or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Sends a one-time password recovery token to the user's email. Always returns 200 regardless of whether the email exists (anti-enumeration protection). No authentication required.

200.description: Recovery email sent (or email not found — not revealed) (code: ACCOUNT_PASSWORD_RECOVERY_SENT)

404.description: Tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Allows the authenticated user to rotate their own password. Requires the current password for verification. Requires Authorization: Bearer <access_token>.

400.description: Validation error — new password violates policy (code: INVALID_INPUT)

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

post.description: Starts the contracting flow: creates a contract in PENDING_EMAIL_VERIFICATION status. The target client app is identified by clientAppId in the request body.

404.description: Plan version not found (code: PLAN_VERSION_NOT_FOUND)

post.description: Validates the 6-digit code sent to the contractor's email. Advances contract status from PENDING_EMAIL_VERIFICATION → PENDING_PAYMENT.

200.description: Email verified — contract now in PENDING_PAYMENT (code: APP_CONTRACT_EMAIL_VERIFIED)

400.description: Verification code is invalid or already used (code: INVALID_INPUT)

404.description: Contract or provider app not found (code: CONTRACT_NOT_FOUND / PROVIDER_APP_NOT_FOUND)

422.description: Verification code has expired — resend a new one (code: EMAIL_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED)

post.description: Resends the 6-digit verification code to the contractor's email. If the current code is still valid, the **same code** is resent (no regeneration). If the code has already expired, a **new code** is generated and the contract updated. Only valid when the contract is in `PENDING_EMAIL_VERIFICATION` status.

404.description: Contract not found (code: CONTRACT_NOT_FOUND)

422.description: Contract is not in PENDING_EMAIL_VERIFICATION state (code: CONTRACT_INVALID_STATE)

post.description: Simulates a successful payment for a contract in PENDING_PAYMENT status. Only available when `keygo.billing.mock-payment-enabled=true`.

404.description: Contract not found or mock disabled (code: CONTRACT_NOT_FOUND / RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

422.description: Contract already ACTIVE or CANCELLED, cannot approve (code: CONTRACT_INVALID_STATE)

post.description: Activates a READY_TO_ACTIVATE contract: creates the subscription and first invoice.

404.description: Contract or plan version not found (code: CONTRACT_NOT_FOUND / PLAN_VERSION_NOT_FOUND)

422.description: Contract is not in READY_TO_ACTIVATE state, payment not verified, or no contractor linked (code: CONTRACT_INVALID_STATE)

get.description: Returns the complete profile of the authenticated user (all OIDC extended fields). Requires Authorization: Bearer <access_token>.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: User or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

patch.description: Partially updates the profile of the authenticated user. Only non-null fields are updated (PATCH semantics). Requires Authorization: Bearer <access_token>.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: User or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

get.description: Returns the notification preferences of the authenticated user. If the user has never configured them, default values are returned. Requires Authorization: Bearer <access_token>.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

patch.description: Updates all notification preferences of the authenticated user (upsert). All 5 boolean fields are required. Unknown fields in the body return 400. Requires Authorization: Bearer <access_token>.

400.description: Validation error — unknown field or invalid body (code: INVALID_INPUT)

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

get.description: Returns identity claims of the authenticated user per OIDC Core 1.0 §5.3. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` — the token must have been issued by the `POST /oauth2/token` endpoint with `openid` scope.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: User or tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

get.description:
Starts the OAuth2 Authorization Code + PKCE flow. Validates that the tenant is active, the client app exists and the redirect URI is registered. Stores the authorization state in the HTTP session so that `POST /account/login` can retrieve it.

**Flow:** `GET /authorize` → `POST /account/login` → `POST /oauth2/token`

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Optional opaque value to maintain state

parameters.name: code_challenge
parameters.description: PKCE code challenge (BASE64URL of SHA-256 of verifier)

200.description: Authorization initiated — client app metadata returned (code: AUTHORIZATION_INITIATED)

400.description: Invalid or missing query parameters (code: INVALID_INPUT)

404.description: Tenant or client app not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

get.description: Returns the current active subscription for the client app. {tenantSlug} is the tenant created by the Contractor (has contractor_id in DB). Requires ADMIN_TENANT role.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: No subscription found for this contractor (code: SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND)

get.description: Returns all invoices associated with the client app subscription. Requires ADMIN_TENANT role.

404.description: Tenant or client app not found

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token

get.description: Returns all active public plans for the specified client app. No authentication required. Each entry includes the plan metadata, its active version (price, billing period, trial days) and the associated entitlements.

404.description: Tenant or client app not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

get.description: Returns a single active public plan identified by its code, including the active version (price, billing period, trial days) and its full entitlements list. No authentication required.

404.description: Tenant, client app or plan not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

get.description: Returns all ACTIVE sessions of the authenticated user. The current session is identified by matching User-Agent + IP address. Requires Authorization: Bearer <access_token>.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's memberships (apps + roles) within the tenant. Returns an empty list if the user has no memberships. Requires Authorization: Bearer <access_token>.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

get.description: Returns the OpenID Connect Discovery 1.0 document for the specified tenant. This document contains all endpoints (authorization, token, userinfo, jwks_uri) and supported capabilities required for automatic client configuration.

200.description: OIDC discovery document — raw JSON per OIDC Discovery 1.0 spec

404.description: Tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

get.description: Returns the JSON Web Key Set (RFC 7517) containing the active and retired RSA public keys used to sign JWT tokens for the specified tenant. Used by relying parties to verify token signatures.

404.description: Tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

get.description: Retrieves tenant details by its unique slug identifier.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Unique slug identifier of the tenant

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Tenant not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

get.description: Returns public metadata about the running service: title, name, and version. This endpoint does not require authentication.
Returns the full catalog of KeyGo response codes, separated into success codes and failure codes. This endpoint does not require authentication.
Returns aggregated counts of tenants (by status), users (by status), client apps and active signing keys. Requires ADMIN role.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

403.description: Insufficient permissions — ADMIN role required (code: INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS)

get.description: Returns the current status and details of a subscription contract.

404.description: Contract not found (code: CONTRACT_NOT_FOUND)

get.description: Returns the current onboarding state of a contract with UI-oriented hints (`nextAction`, `verificationCodeExpired`). Use this endpoint to restore the frontend flow when the user returns after closing the page. Returns 400 if the contract is in a terminal state (EXPIRED, CANCELLED, FAILED, SUPERSEDED, FINALIZED).

404.description: Contract not found (code: CONTRACT_NOT_FOUND)

422.description: Contract is in a terminal state (EXPIRED, CANCELLED, FAILED, SUPERSEDED, FINALIZED) and cannot be resumed (code: CONTRACT_INVALID_STATE)

get.description: Returns a full aggregated view of the platform: service status, security metrics, tenant/user/app/membership counts, rankings, pending actions and recent activity. Requires ADMIN role.

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

403.description: Insufficient permissions — ADMIN role required (code: INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS)

delete.description: Remove user access to an application

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

404.description: Membership not found (code: RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)

delete.description: Closes a session belonging to the authenticated user. Idempotent: returns already_closed=true if the session was already closed or not found. Requires Authorization: Bearer <access_token>.

200.description: Session revoked or already closed (code: ACCOUNT_SESSION_REVOKED or ACCOUNT_SESSION_ALREADY_CLOSED)

401.description: Missing or invalid Bearer token (code: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED)

403.description: Session does not belong to the authenticated user (code: BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION)

BearerAuth.description: Bearer JWT token issued by KeyGo OAuth2/OIDC endpoints.
